Class BulkCandlingGroupAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder>
androidx.recyclerview.widget.ListAdapter<EggGroup, edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder>
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BulkCandlingGroupAdapter
public class BulkCandlingGroupAdapter extends ListAdapter<EggGroup, edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder>
Adapter used to display egg groups and collect bulk candling input values.

Each row shows an egg group and lets the user enter the number of viable eggs observed for that group.

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder holder, int position)
      Binds an egg-group item to the specified view holder.
      Specified by:
      onBindViewHolder in class RecyclerView.Adapter<edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller.BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      holder - target view holder.
      position - adapter position.

    • hasAnyEnteredValue

      public boolean hasAnyEnteredValue()
      Returns whether the user has entered at least one non-blank viable-count value.
      Returns:
      true if any value has been entered; otherwise false.

    • collectValidCounts

      @NonNull public Map<Long,Integer> collectValidCounts()
      Collects valid entered values as viable counts keyed by egg-group ID.

      Values are clamped to the range from 0 to the group's initial egg count.

      Returns:
      map of egg-group IDs to validated viable counts.

    • validateInputs

      public boolean validateInputs()
      Validates all entered viable-count values.
      Returns:
      true if all entered values are numeric and within range; otherwise false.
